allow: PowerShell($base = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WayneLY-Chen/MyPortfolio"; foreach \($branch in @\("main","master"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/$branch/frontend/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Branch found: $branch"; $script:branch = $branch; break } catch { Write-Host "Branch $branch not found" } }; Write-Host "Using branch: $branch")

PowerShell($base = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WayneLY-Chen/MyPortfolio/main"; $files = @{ "frontend/index.html" = "c:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\程式\\MyPortfolio\\frontend\\index.html"; "frontend/src/components/TopNav.jsx" = "c:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\程式\\MyPortfolio\\frontend\\src\\components\\TopNav.jsx" }; foreach \($k in $files.Keys\) { $url = "$base/$k"; $dest = $files[$k]; Write-Host "Downloading $k"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "  -> $dest \($\(\(Get-Item $dest\).Length\) bytes\)" })

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command msedge -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe'; Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe'")
